profiles.notes: Optimistic organic profile emphasizing improved multilevel programmability.

profiles.source: Zhang et al., Nature Communications 17, 197 (2026), doi:10.1038/s41467-025-66891-6
profiles.notes: Perplexity-assisted literature-derived case-study profile, checked against the locally copied article PDF. G is normalized to avoid mixing incompatible bias points; uses reported optimal G_max/G_min=47.3. n_states=34 is anchored to Abstract / Results / Fig.3h / Supplementary Fig.8. sigma_c2c=0.02 is a proxy estimate motivated by Supplementary Fig.15 / Fig.3g repeatability evidence; sigma_d2d=0.03 is a proxy estimate motivated by the reported V_th spread across 80 devices and a conservative uplift to conductance-domain variability. Retention remains unfit in the runtime profile because Fig.2d currently supports qualitative state-dependent retention discussion more safely than a locked double-exponential fit. Raw literature NL metrics are intentionally not injected into the runtime profile because they are not numerically equivalent to the simulator surrogate.
Stress-test organic profile used for development before in-house calibration.
